metrics.source_label: Statistics Agency SIAT trade data, calculated YoY
caveats: Trade values can be revised; show latest-vintage status.
YoY rate calculated from official SIAT cumulative monthly export levels: USD 3,546.808 million for January-February 2026 versus USD 4,643.0 million for January-February 2025.
warnings: Owner approved calculated YoY from official observed SIAT levels; current lock still classifies this metric as observed pending later cleanup.

metrics.source_label: Statistics Agency SIAT trade data, calculated YoY
caveats: Trade values can be revised; show latest-vintage status.
YoY rate calculated from official SIAT cumulative monthly import levels: USD 8,058.287 million for January-February 2026 versus USD 6,202.6 million for January-February 2025.
warnings: Owner approved calculated YoY from official observed SIAT levels; current lock still classifies this metric as observed pending later cleanup.

metrics.source_label: Statistics Agency SIAT trade data, calculated
metrics.source_reference: Calculated from SIAT export and import monthly datasets: exports USD 3,546.808 million, imports USD 8,058.287 million.
caveats: Displayed value is in USD billion and is calculated from SIAT cumulative monthly goods/trade levels.
Label goods trade balance if services are excluded.
warnings: Owner approved calculated trade balance from official observed SIAT export and import levels; current lock unit remains broad pending later cleanup.

metrics.source_label: Central Bank of Uzbekistan policy rate
caveats: Event-based setting; do not infer policy stance without inflation context.

metrics.source_label: Central Bank of Uzbekistan exchange rate
caveats: Official/reference rate, not transaction-weighted market average.

metrics.source_reference: Calculated from CBU official USD rates: 12020.48 on 2026-04-27 and 12179.87 on 2026-03-27
caveats: Positive values indicate UZS depreciation against USD.

metrics.source_reference: Calculated from CBU official USD rates: 12020.48 on 2026-04-27 and 12927.17 on 2025-04-25
caveats: Positive values indicate UZS depreciation against USD.

metrics.source_reference: Owner-supplied CERR REER value; source URL to be provided and later automated through the HFI source path.
caveats: Index definition: 2019=100.
Methodology note: CPI-deflated real effective exchange rate, trade-weighted basket.

metrics.source_label: World Bank Pink Sheet gold price
caveats: External monthly average market price; not a CERR forecast.

metrics.source_label: World Bank Pink Sheet gold price, calculated
metrics.source_reference: Calculated from World Bank Pink Sheet monthly gold prices: 4855.54 for March 2026 and 5019.97 for February 2026
caveats: Comparison basis is MoM.

metrics.source_label: World Bank Commodity Markets Outlook gold forecast
caveats: External reference assumption, not a CERR forecast or policy recommendation.
Forecast vintage predates the March 2026 spot reading; do not read the level gap as a CERR call.
